items.title: Approval Phishing: From Just One Case to Full-Scale Disruption
items.summary: Chain of Thought is our new expert-hosted webinar series, taking you behind the scenes of real investigations, emerging typologies and… The post Approval Phishing: From Just One Case to Full-Scale Disruption appeared first on Chainalysis.

items.title: Bitcoin faces fresh capitulation risk as 50K BTC moved at a loss
items.summary: Nearly 50,000 BTC shifted to exchanges at a loss while short-term Bitcoin holders' stress level reached 2-year highs. Is BTC headed toward new lows?

items.title: US senators urge CFTC probe Polymarket over ‘deceptive marketing’
items.summary: Senators John Curtis and Adam Schiff are concerned about the CFTC’s enforcement ability after a “troubling” report on Polymarket’s advertising.

items.title: SEC, CFTC seek input on unified portfolio margin rules across securities and derivatives
items.summary: The regulatory agencies are seeking public feedback on cross-margining, collateral and risk management as cryptocurrency derivatives and multi-asset trading continue to expand.

items.title: Bitcoin makes first sub-$60K close since Q3 2024 as tech stocks enter ‘deep bear market’
items.summary: Bitcoin risked turning $60,000 into resistance as BTC price weakness persisted following another tech-driven sell-off in Asian stock markets.

items.title: Bitcoin falls below $60,000, on track for a rare back-to-back quarterly loss
items.summary: The token is down nearly 7% on the week with the altcoins falling harder. Bitcoin and ether are both ending the second quarter in the red, a back-to-back losing first half that runs against the usual pattern.

items.title: Base post-mortem reveals sequencer bug behind back-to-back outages
items.summary: A “race condition” after the system was reset prevented the sequencers from catching up, causing the second outage.

items.title: Bitcoin unspent transaction outputs signal capitulation underway: analyst
items.summary: “These periods have always been profitable for long-term investors,” said CryptoQuant analyst Darkfost.

items.title: Why a selloff in gold and silver is dragging bitcoin down
items.summary: Bitcoin has long been lumped in with precious metals as a hedge against a weakening dollar. That trade is unwinding on a hawkish Fed, and bitcoin is falling alongside the metals it was supposed to rival.

items.title: What Robinhood’s recent layoffs say about the current state of crypto investments
items.summary: Despite the trading platform’s restructuring and the wave of crypto companies making cuts, signaling a late bear market, Altcoin Pro’s Horst, Anderson and Zhuleku explain there’s no reason to panic.

items.title: Tether putting $23 billion gold stockpile to work with bullion-backed loans
items.summary: The stablecoin issuer is extending its tokenized gold strategy by allowing holders of XAUT to borrow against their bullion, mirroring bitcoin-backed lending without selling the underlying asset.

items.title: Polymarket hack updated to $3.1 million days after the platform promised users full refunds
items.summary: The prediction markets giant is under investigation in connection with false or deceptive marketing practices, according to news reports.

items.title: Coinbase and OKX try to lure in Binance’s EU users after it failed to secure a MiCA license
items.summary: Brian Armstrong of Coinbase and Star Xu of OKX offered new users sign up bonuses of up to 8% of their deposits or transfers from other accounts.

items.title: Binance founder CZ blames crypto's sour 2026 on mix of AI, global tension, 4-year cycle
items.summary: There is no single cause for the crypto market's 50% decline over the past year, the Binance founder told CoinDesk.

items.title: Strategy's valuation has fallen below the value of its bitcoin holdings
items.summary: For years, investors had valued the firm well above its bitcoin holdings, giving Strategy massive flexibility to raise capital as needed — a situation Michael Saylor and team took full advantage of.

items.title: Ripple CEO stays bullish on bitcoin but says Saylor's strategy has hurt crypto
items.summary: Ripple's Brad Garlinghouse called Strategy's preferred-stock funding model "financial engineering" that distracted the market, pointing to STRC's slide to a record low as the evidence. He runs the company behind XRP, a bitcoin rival.

items.title: Dogecoin and Hyperliquid's HYPE led weekly crypto losses as AI stocks lure buyers
items.summary: A rotation out of chipmakers lifted much of the stock market, with the equal-weight S&P 500 at a record. Crypto was not part of it. Ether fell 8% on the week and the memecoins dropped harder.

items.title: Fidelity rebuts claims Bitcoin becomes less secure after halvings
items.summary: The asset manager argues Bitcoin's fixed supply schedule does not undermine network security, even as miners face shrinking block rewards after each halving.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: DCG-backed Yuma launches fund offering institutional exposure to Bittensor
items.summary: The new investment vehicle arrives as asset managers expand TAO offerings and decentralized AI gains momentum following recent restrictions on Anthropic's models.
